commit.message:
fix: use os._exit(1) for reliable restart after update/restart in Telegram

sys.exit(1) raises SystemExit which python-telegram-bot catches, preventing
the process from actually terminating. Use os._exit(1) with 1s delay
instead — bypasses exception handlers and ensures systemd restarts the service.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Strengthen GREEN signal bonus, widen gap over YELLOW

Signal bonus was too small (1.5-4.5) for GREEN to outrank YELLOW stocks
that had higher base scores. YELLOW stocks score high because the
"missing" criterion means higher component values the scoring rewards.

Scale factor doubled (0.25→0.5), cap raised (5→8), YELLOW reduced
(60%→30%). GREEN now gets commanding advantage: QMO +8.0, REV +3.7,
MOM +3.0. YELLOW is a mild nudge: QMO +2.4, REV +1.1, MOM +0.9.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix update modal not loading existing field values (notes, etc.)

openUpdateModal() was using the raw API response object instead of
unwrapping data.request first. This caused all fields (notes, deadline,
turn, etc.) to show as empty and get overwritten with blanks on save.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Stack: HTML + Supabase Auth + Vercel Serverless + Chart.js

commit.message:
Re-score candidates immediately after calibration

Calibration saved new weights but didn't re-score the 540 candidates
in lastCandidateScores, so the scorecard showed stale scores until the
next Scan Market. Now rescoreCandidates() re-runs calculateCompositeScore
on all stored candidates with the new calibrated weights, re-sorts,
saves, and refreshes both the scorecard and trade insights.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Preserve previousPage when reopening detail after save (don't overwrite with 'detail')

- Change #app to fixed height:100vh so sidebar fills viewport without sticky hack

commit.message:
Fix cumulative signal bonus bug inflating scores on every re-render

Signal bonus was mutating c.compositeScore on the persisted objects,
causing scores to inflate every time the scorecard re-rendered (sort,
filter, page change). BTDR went from 16.6 to 44.2 after ~15 renders.

Fix: store bonus as ephemeral c._signalBonus, add it at display time
only (score display, sort accessor, maxScore, tooltip). Never mutate
the stored compositeScore. Removed server-side bonus application to
prevent double-counting when browser loads server scan results.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: replace pyqpanda with ZMQ-based quantum simulator client

pyqpanda failed to install on Railway (C++ bindings, platform-specific).
Replaced with pyzmq client that talks to Origin's Python quantum simulator.
Also removed pytest from production deps and updated default PilotOS port.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix detail view going blank after saving an update

closeUpdateModal() nulled pendingUpdateId before openDetail() used
it, so the detail view rendered with null. Capture the ID first.

scorecard expanded by default, trade insights collapsed, and full
column highlighting threshold table.

feat: add telemetry:numpoints setting for sysinfo chart history length (#98)

* feat: add telemetry:numpoints setting for sysinfo chart history length

Adds a configurable `telemetry:numpoints` setting (30-1024, default 120) that
controls how many data points the sysinfo CPU chart displays. History duration
is numpoints × interval (e.g., 300 points at 1s = 5 minutes).

Changes:
- schema/settings.json: add telemetry:numpoints schema entry
- wconfig.rs: add telemetry_numpoints field to SettingsType
- sysinfo-model.ts: numPoints atom reads from global settings first

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: prevent cmd shell flash when opening settings on Windows

On Windows, open_in_editor was spawning `cmd /C start` which flashed a
visible console window. Use CREATE_NO_WINDOW flag to suppress it, and
skip the CLI editor probing on Windows (use OS default directly).

commit.message:
Add calibration-driven signal bonus to scoring, fix column highlights

Signal bonus: GREEN entry signals now boost composite score scaled by
calibration edge (0.25 per % point, capped at 5.0). YELLOW gets 60%.
Shows in score tooltip as "Signal: +X.X". Applied on both browser and
server scans.

Highlight fixes: MOM green threshold raised 3→5 (aligns with entry
patterns), RS green added for ≥60 (was warnings-only despite 0.6x
weight). Server momentumMultiplier synced 0.6→0.3.

UX: Candidate Scorecard expanded by default, Trade Insights collapsed.

The old default (0.35) produced only 1 observed basin, making all
competitive_lv benchmark results trivial. Scale 0.70 yields 4 major
basins with meaningful species-extinction diversity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: record Kuramoto mode-support audit results (strong negative)

The Kuramoto unique mode-support audit (30/30 array tasks, collector
complete) confirms that winding-number basins do not have meaningful
basin-specific support patterns. Uniqueness is trivially degenerate:
every trajectory has its own singleton support, Hamming geometry is
flat, and the result is identical across all 3 model families, 5 seeds,
both sampling protocols, all support definitions, and all thresholds.

Updates EXPERIMENTS.md, PAPER_TRACK_STATUS.md, and notes.tex to reflect
the completed audit and close the previously open stronger claim.

commit.message:
feat: hoist extension to package root for native Gemini CLI install

Make `gemini extensions install github:jjongguet/oh-my-gemini` work
natively by moving extension files from `extensions/oh-my-gemini/` to
package root and restructuring commands under `commands/omg/` namespace.

Changes:
- Move gemini-extension.json, GEMINI.md to package root
- Restructure commands/ into commands/omg/ namespace (→ /omg:doctor etc.)
- Move extension skills/ to package root skills/
- Remove extensions/oh-my-gemini/ directory
- Update EXTENSION_ROOT_RELATIVE_PATH to '.'
- Update skill resolver fallback path to ../../skills
- Add omg-binary PATH check to omg doctor
- Add auto gemini extensions install in omg setup
- Update package.json files[] to include root-level extension assets
- Update all docs, scripts, and tests to reflect new paths
- Add smoke test: tests/smoke/extension-installable.test.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: correct stats counts, status types, nav bugs

- IngestionStats now uses per-status counts from status endpoint
- Remove useIngestedItems() from IngestionStats (was paginated, inaccurate)
- SubscriptionStats paused count uses status field not enabled flag
- Add 'processing' to IngestionStatus type and INGESTION_STATUSES constants
- Add completed_items, failed_items, pending_items, processing_items, check_interval_seconds to StatusResponse type
- Fix manual ingest redirect to /ingested (was /ingestion)
- Fix settings check interval to use actual value from API instead of hardcoded "30 seconds"
- Fix settings GitHub URL from placeholder to https://github.com/eddiedunn/curator

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: curator-web
repository.description: React + TypeScript frontend for the Curator content aggregation service. Manages YouTube/RSS/podcast subscriptions, tracks ingestion jobs in real time, and browses curated content. Built with Vite, Tailwind CSS, and React Query.

commit.message:
Port heatmap visualization engine with CUBE CSS decomposition

Ported canvas heatmap from NurtureBioDemo, decomposed into strict CUBE
layers: palettes (tokens), tab-grid/canopy (compositions), visual
treatments (blocks), aria-selected state (exceptions). Spring-animated
canvas grids with shared rAF ticker. Demo wired on Data page.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Filter heat dots by setup relevance to eliminate mixed signals

Heat dots now only show combos relevant to the stock's displayed setup
badge. REV stocks show reversal-group combos (not cold momentum combos),
MOM/QMO stocks show momentum-group combos, etc. Anti-patterns always
shown. Unbadged stocks still show all combos. Adds group field to all
30 SIGNAL_COMBO_DEFS and SETUP_HEAT_GROUPS mapping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix transparent mode URL hover/click offset mismatch with scrollback

Unify content y-offset calculation into a single function used by both
the renderer and mouse hit-testing, so they can never drift apart again.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: proactive chat curiosity — agenda endpoint, opener question, suggestion chips

- analysis/curiosity.py: Added pricing_gap, cogs_gap, and target_gap agenda
  types so the agenda covers sell price, supplier cost, and profit targets
  in addition to existing recipe/delivery/staffing gaps

- app/routers/chat.py: Added GET /chat/agenda endpoint that returns the
  ranked curiosity agenda plus an opener question string for the UI

- frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx: On mount, fetch the agenda and
  pre-seed one assistant opener message; show remaining agenda items as
  clickable suggestion chips that pre-fill the input box

- frontend/src/types/api.ts: Added ChatAgendaItem and ChatAgendaResponse types

- frontend/src/styles.css: Added .agenda-chips and .agenda-chip styles

Also picks up background work: sale_understanding module for smarter
recipe coverage classification, richer knowledge_gaps logic (family_only
vs exact match), and expanded chat context + test coverage.

350 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: convert recursive upgrade skip to loop and clip long fighter names

Replace recursive _show_next_upgrade call with a while loop to prevent
potential stack overflow when all party members lack upgrades. Add text
clipping with ellipsis to fighter bar name labels to handle long
character name + class name combinations.

commit.message:
fix: guard against edge cases in battle engine, fighter bar, and title screen

Clamp heal amount to non-negative to prevent heals from damaging when
caster stats are heavily debuffed. Guard empty targets array in AI
targeting to prevent crash on simultaneous deaths. Prevent division by
zero in HP bar color calculation. Show error feedback when save load
fails instead of silently doing nothing.

fix: prevent scene transition soft-lock and pause menu during fades

Reset _transitioning flag on scene load failure so subsequent transitions
aren't permanently blocked. Block pause overlay during scene transitions
to prevent it appearing over the fade. Remove unreachable dead code in
threaded load fallback.

commit.message:
fix(frontend): track gitignored src/lib/ files for CI Frontend Gate 1

Root cause: .gitignore line 37 `lib/` catches frontend/src/lib/*.
These files exist locally but were absent in CI, causing 30+ cascade
TS errors (missing modules → implicit any → type unknown).

Force-added: agents.ts, api.ts, reward-engine.ts, agent-model.ts,
trust-panel.tsx, persistence.ts (already added in previous commit).

fix(dashboard): use status.total_items for accurate ingestion count

listIngestedItems() is paginated (default limit 100), so items.length
always showed 100. Use total_items from /api/v1/status instead, which
returns the real count from the DB.

commit.message:
Add flatten pass for IFC/Revit model hierarchy

Destructive pre-scan pass that explodes organizational containers
(IFC project/site/building/storey, Revit level groups, single-child
wrappers) while preserving assemblies with actual geometry. Harvests
metadata before explode and stamps onto children via FF_Flatten
attribute dictionary. Scanner reads inherited name/tag/IFC type as
fallback. Purges orphaned definitions to prevent doubled counts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add ZQuest Classic (Zelda fan game engine)

Downloadable for Linux (tar.gz) and Windows (zip) from GitHub releases.
Includes faithful NES Zelda recreation plus hundreds of community quests.

Bump version to 0.4.0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(api): use relative base URL so requests go through nginx proxy

Hardcoded fallback http://localhost:8950 bypassed nginx entirely, hitting
the browser's own localhost. Empty string makes all API calls relative
(/api/v1/...) which nginx proxies to curator:8950 on the container network.

commit.message:
Add migration to drop UNIQUE constraint on foia_number in production

The production PostgreSQL still had the UNIQUE constraint from the
original schema, causing 500s when per-user numbering generated
duplicate FOIA numbers across users. This runs on startup via init_db.

commit.message:
Halve momentum weight and auto-sort legend by calibration edge

Momentum is anti-predictive per calibration (r=-0.025, top quintile
underperforms by 7.4%). Reduced momentumMultiplier from 0.6 to 0.3 so
it becomes a minor tilt rather than the dominant score contributor.
Legend now dynamically sorts setups by vsBaselineReturn descending.

commit.message:
fix(nginx): point API proxy at curator:8950 on gpu-services network

Resolver was 169.254.1.1 (invalid) and upstream was a literal placeholder
URL. Use 10.89.0.1 (Podman gpu-services gateway) as resolver and
http://curator:8950 as upstream. Switch to $request_uri so paths are
passed through correctly without stripping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: server commands check .env instead of node config for server detection

syne start/stop/restart/status now check for .env (created by syne init)
to determine if this is a Syne server. If not, shows message:
"This machine is not a Syne server." with guidance to use syne init or
syne node commands. This allows a machine to be both server and node.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: blacklist survives fleet swap — expand to model family history

After retraining and replacing the entire model fleet, new model_ids
have zero prediction_accuracy history. The INNER JOIN to enabled models
returned 0 rows, making the blacklist blind to chronic losers like
KAT (18.2% HR), Jamal Murray (23.1%), Donovan Mitchell (27.3%).

Fix: expand scope from enabled models to all models in same family
as enabled models (excluding status='disabled'). Predecessors of
current models share the same prediction patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
